case_title: DEUTSCHE BANK NATIONAL TRUST COMPANY, AS TRUSTEE VS. LISA CAREY et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DEUTSCHE BANK NATIONAL TRUST COMPANY, AS TRUSTEE OF THE INDYMAC INDX MORTGAGE LOAN TRUST 2004-AR15, MORTGAGE PASS-THROUGH CERTIFICATES, SERIES 2004-AR15 UNDER THE POOLING AND SERVICING AGREEMENT DATED DECEMBER 1, 2004 RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CAREY, LISA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1935 28TH AVENUE, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94116, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT CAREY, LISA DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE

EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT CAREY, LISA
